channel.title: AI Security and Compliance News
channel.description: AI-powered news and analysis on cybersecurity, compliance, and IT operations.

item.title: AI-Powered Malware: The Rise of Slopoly and Hive0163's Threat
item.description: The cybersecurity landscape just got a significant upgrade in threat sophistication. New research reveals Hive0163 is utilizing AI-generated malware, dubbed Slopoly, to streamline ransomware operations. This development signals a new era for enterprise security.

item.title: Beyond the Inbox: Phishing Attacks Weaponize Your SOC Workload
item.description: Phishing has evolved beyond simple email scams. Modern attackers are now designing campaigns to overwhelm and exhaust your Security Operations Center (SOC) analysts, turning routine investigations into critical incidents. This new threat paradigm demands a shift in defensive strategies.

item.title: n8n Critical Flaws: RCE & Credential Exposure Alert
item.description: A recent disclosure from cybersecurity researchers has revealed two critical vulnerabilities in the n8n workflow automation platform. These flaws, carrying CVSS scores up to 9.5, could lead to remote code execution and the exposure of sensitive stored credentials, posing significant risks to IT operations and data security.

item.title: Proactive Defense: Mastering Your Attack Surface Against Zero-Days
item.description: The frantic scramble during a zero-day exploit is a familiar, unwelcome scenario for many IT and security teams. But what if much of that panic could be avoided? A recent report highlights that proactive attack surface reduction is key to mitigating the impact of inevitable vulnerabilities.

item.title: 2026 Compliance Crossroads: Mastering Evolving Frameworks
item.description: The regulatory landscape is shifting dramatically. For IT professionals, security teams, and compliance officers, understanding the latest updates to CMMC 2.0, SOC 2 Type II, and HIPAA is no longer optional—it's imperative. Prepare for tighter timelines and increased enforcement.

item.title: AirDrop Attack: UNC4899's Cloud Compromise Exposes Enterprise Vulnerabilities
item.description: A seemingly innocuous AirDrop transfer led to a multi-million dollar cloud compromise by the North Korean threat actor UNC4899. This incident serves as a stark reminder of the evolving attack vectors and the necessity for robust security protocols.

item.title: Zero-Day Blitz: Navigating Qualcomm, iOS & New Cyber Threats
item.description: Another week, another stark reminder of the relentless pace of cyber threats. From a critical Qualcomm 0-day to sophisticated iOS exploit chains and novel attack vectors, defenders were kept on their toes. This post unpacks the key takeaways from the latest cybersecurity headlines.

item.title: AI Transforms Code Security: OpenAI's New Vulnerability Agent
item.description: The landscape of software security is shifting. OpenAI has just unveiled Codex Security, an AI agent designed to proactively identify, validate, and propose fixes for vulnerabilities in your codebase. This innovation promises to revolutionize how organizations approach secure development.

item.title: AI Transforms Code Security: A New Era for Vulnerability Detection
item.description: The landscape of software development security is undergoing a seismic shift. OpenAI's new Codex Security agent is demonstrating unprecedented capabilities in identifying and fixing vulnerabilities at scale, promising a future of more resilient codebases.

item.title: OpenAI Codex Security: AI's Bold Leap in Code Vulnerability
item.description: The cybersecurity landscape just got a powerful new ally. OpenAI's Codex Security, an AI-powered agent, has scanned millions of code commits, uncovering thousands of high-severity vulnerabilities and proposing fixes. This innovation marks a significant shift in how organizations can approach code security, promising to revolutionize DevSecOps workflows.

item.title: AI's Deep Dive: OpenAI Codex Security Reshapes Code Security
item.description: The landscape of software security is undergoing a seismic shift. OpenAI's recently launched Codex Security, an AI-powered agent, has revealed the sheer scale of vulnerabilities lurking in codebases. Its initial findings underscore the transformative potential of AI in proactive code security.

item.title: AI-Powered Code Security: OpenAI Codex Unearths Thousands of Vulnerabilities
item.description: The cybersecurity landscape just gained a powerful new ally. OpenAI has unveiled Codex Security, an AI-powered agent designed to proactively identify and fix vulnerabilities in codebases. This innovative tool promises to redefine how organizations approach software security.

item.title: VOID#GEIST: Deconstructing the Stealthy Multi-Stage RAT Threat
item.description: A new multi-stage malware campaign, dubbed VOID#GEIST, is leveraging obfuscated batch scripts to deploy a trio of potent Remote Access Trojans: XWorm, AsyncRAT, and Xeno RAT. Securonix Threat Research has unveiled the intricate details of this stealthy attack chain, highlighting a significant evolution in threat actor tactics.

item.title: VOID#GEIST: New Multi-RAT Malware Threat Emerges
item.description: A newly discovered malware campaign, dubbed VOID#GEIST, is leveraging sophisticated techniques to deliver a trio of potent Remote Access Trojans (RATs). Security teams need to understand this multi-stage attack to protect their environments.
